description: Remote Desktop Protocol (RDP) Activity events report post-authentication remote client connections between clients and servers over the network.

certificate_chain.caption: certificate_chain
certificate_chain.description: The list of observed certificates in an RDP TLS connection.

connection_info.caption: connection_info
connection_info.description: The remote desktop connection details, either connection-based or connectionless.

device.caption: device
device.description: The device instigating the RDP connection.

file.caption: file
file.description: The file that is the target of the RDP activity.

request.caption: request
request.description: The client request in an RDP network connection.

response.caption: response
response.description: The server response in an RDP network connection.

user.caption: user
user.description: The target user associated with the RDP activity.
